{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 2008
|other_titles    = Copa do Brasil 2008
|image           =
|imagesize       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = February 13 – June 11
|num_teams       = 64
|champions       = [[Sport Club do Recife|Sport (PE)]]
|runner-up       = [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians (SP)]]
|matches         = 111
|goals           = 342
|top goal scorer = 
|player          = 
|prevseason      = [[2007 Copa do Brasil|2007]]
|nextseason      = [[2009 Copa do Brasil|2009]]
}}

The '''Copa do Brasil 2008''' was the 20th staging of the [[Copa do Brasil]], starting on February 13, 2008 and finishing on June 11, 2008. It was played by 64 teams, either qualified through their respected state championships (54) or by the CBF Rankings (10). The clubs that played the [[Copa Libertadores 2008]] didn't participate in the Copa do Brasil 2008 because of scheduling problems. It was won by [[Sport Club do Recife|Sport-PE]].

==Format==
The tournament was played in two-legged knockout stages. In the first two rounds the away team automatically goes through to the next round if they beat the home team by a 2-goal difference or more in the first leg.

The [[away goals rule]] was used in the Copa do Brasil, which is an unusual feature when compared to other South American competitions. For example, the Copa Libertadores did not adopt this rule until 2005.

Copa do Brasil is an opportunity for teams from smaller states to play against the big teams and episodes of giant-killing have happened at a regular rate throughout the competition history.

The winner automatically qualifies for the next year's Copa Libertadores, which prevents a team from winning the Copa do Brasil twice in a row.

==Results==

===Bracket 1===
{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n
| RD1= First Round
| RD2= Second Round
| RD3= Round of 16
| RD4= Quarterfinals

| RD1-team01 = '''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians-SP]]'''
| RD1-team02 = [[Barras Futebol Clube|Barras-PI]]
| RD1-score01-1 = 6
| RD1-score02-1 = 0
| RD1-score01-2 =–
| RD1-score02-2 =–
| RD1-score01-agg=6
| RD1-score02-agg=0
| RD1-team03 = '''[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza-CE]]'''
| RD1-team04 = [[América Futebol Clube (SE)|América-SE]]
| RD1-score03-1 = 0
| RD1-score04-1 = 0
| RD1-score03-2 = 4
| RD1-score04-2 = 0
| RD1-score03-agg=4
| RD1-score04-agg=0
| RD1-team05 = '''[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás-GO]]'''
| RD1-team06 = [[Cacerense Esporte Clube|Cacerense-MT]]
| RD1-score05-1 = '''4'''
| RD1-score06-1 = 1
| RD1-score05-2 = –
| RD1-score06-2 = –
| RD1-score05-agg=4
| RD1-score06-agg=1
| RD1-team07 = [[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz-PE]]
| RD1-team08 = '''[[Nacional Fast Clube|Fast Clube-AM]]'''
| RD1-score07-1 = 1
| RD1-score08-1 = 3
| RD1-score07-2 = 1
| RD1-score08-2 = 0
| RD1-score07-agg=2
| RD1-score08-agg=3
| RD1-team09 = '''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio-RS]]'''
| RD1-team10 = [[Grêmio Esportivo Jaciara|Jaciara-MT]]
| RD1-score09-1 = 1
| RD1-score10-1 = 0
| RD1-score09-2 = 6
| RD1-score10-2 = 0
| RD1-score09-agg=7
| RD1-score10-agg=0
| RD1-team11 = '''[[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético-GO]]'''
| RD1-team12 = [[Ituiutaba Esporte Clube|Ituiutaba-MG]]
| RD1-score11-1 = 0
| RD1-score12-1 = 0
| RD1-score11-2 = 3
| RD1-score12-2 = 2
| RD1-score11-agg=3
| RD1-score12-agg=2
| RD1-team13 = '''[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba-PR]]'''
| RD1-team14 = [[Tuna Luso Brasileira|Tuna Luso-PA]]
| RD1-score13-1 = 0
| RD1-score14-1 = 0
| RD1-score13-2 = 6
| RD1-score14-2 = 0
| RD1-score13-agg=6
| RD1-score14-agg=0
| RD1-team15 = '''[[Associação Desportiva São Caetano|São Caetano-SP]]'''
| RD1-team16 = [[Maranhão Atlético Clube|Maranhão-MA]] <sup>DSQ</sup>
| RD1-score15-1 = 2
| RD1-score16-1 = 1
| RD1-score15-2 =–
| RD1-score16-2 =–
| RD1-score15-agg=2
| RD1-score16-agg=1
| RD2-team01 = '''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians-SP]]'''
| RD2-team02 = [[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza-CE]] 
| RD2-score01-1 = 2
| RD2-score02-1 = 1
| RD2-score01-2 = 2
| RD2-score02-2 = 0
| RD2-score01-agg=4
| RD2-score02-agg=1
| RD2-team03 = '''[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás-GO]]'''
| RD2-team04 = [[Nacional Fast Clube|Fast Clube-AM]]
| RD2-score03-1 = 3
| RD2-score04-1 = 1
| RD2-score03-2 =–
| RD2-score04-2 =–
| RD2-score03-agg=3
| RD2-score04-agg=1
| RD2-team05 = [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio-RS]]
| RD2-team06 = '''[[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético-GO]]'''
| RD2-score05-1 = 1
| RD2-score06-1 = 2
| RD2-score05-2 = 2
| RD2-score06-2 = 1
| RD2-score05-agg=3 (3)
| RD2-score06-agg=3 (4)
| RD2-team07 = [[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba-PR]]
| RD2-team08 = '''[[Associação Desportiva São Caetano|São Caetano-SP]]'''
| RD2-score07-1 = 0
| RD2-score08-1 = 1
| RD2-score07-2 = 0
| RD2-score08-2 = 0
| RD2-score07-agg=0
| RD2-score08-agg=1
| RD3-team01 = '''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians-SP]]'''
| RD3-team02 = [[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás-GO]]
| RD3-score01-1 = 1
| RD3-score02-1 = 3
| RD3-score01-2 = 4
| RD3-score02-2 = 0
| RD3-score01-agg=5
| RD3-score02-agg=3
| RD3-team03 = [[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético-GO]]
| RD3-team04 = '''[[Associação Desportiva São Caetano|São Caetano-SP]]'''
| RD3-score03-1 = 1
| RD3-score04-1 = 2
| RD3-score03-2 = 1
| RD3-score04-2 = 2
| RD3-score03-agg=2
| RD3-score04-agg=4
| RD4-team01 = '''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians-SP]]'''
| RD4-team02 = [[Associação Desportiva São Caetano|São Caetano-SP]]
| RD4-score01-1 = 2
| RD4-score02-1 = 1
| RD4-score01-2 = 3
| RD4-score02-2 = 1
| RD4-score01-agg=5
| RD4-score02-agg=2
}}

===Bracket 2===
{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n
| RD1= First Round
| RD2= Second Round
| RD3= Round of 16
| RD4= Quarterfinals
| RD1-team01 = '''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo-RJ]]'''
| RD1-team02 = [[Rio Branco Football Club|Rio Branco-AC]]
| RD1-score01-1 = 3
| RD1-score02-1 = 1
| RD1-score01-2 =–
| RD1-score02-2 =–
| RD1-score01-agg=3
| RD1-score02-agg=1
| RD1-team03 = '''[[River Atlético Clube|River-PI]] ([[Away goals rule|a]])'''
| RD1-team04 = [[Associação Jaguaré Esporte Clube|Jaguaré-ES]]
| RD1-score03-1 = 2
| RD1-score04-1 = 3
| RD1-score03-2 = 2
| RD1-score04-2 = 0
| RD1-score03-agg=4
| RD1-score04-agg=3
| RD1-team05 = '''[[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa-SP]]'''
| RD1-team06 = [[Sport Club Ulbra Ji-Paraná|Ulbra Ji-Paraná-RO]]
| RD1-score05-1 = 1
| RD1-score06-1 = 1
| RD1-score05-2 = 3
| RD1-score06-2 = 1
| RD1-score05-agg=4
| RD1-score06-agg=2
| RD1-team07 = '''[[Volta Redonda Futebol Clube|Volta Redonda-RJ]]'''
| RD1-team08 = [[Roma Esporte Apucarana|Roma-PR]]
| RD1-score07-1 = 2
| RD1-score08-1 = 0
| RD1-score07-2 =–
| RD1-score08-2 =–
| RD1-score07-agg=2
| RD1-score08-agg=0
| RD1-team09 = '''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético-MG]]'''
| RD1-team10 = [[Palmas Futebol e Regatas|Palmas-TO]]
| RD1-score09-1 = 7
| RD1-score10-1 = 0
| RD1-score09-2 = –
| RD1-score10-2 = –
| RD1-score09-agg=7
| RD1-score10-agg=0
| RD1-team11 = '''[[Nacional Futebol Clube|Nacional-AM]]'''
| RD1-team12 = [[Clube Esportivo Guará|Guará-DF]]
| RD1-score11-1 =3
| RD1-score12-1 =1
| RD1-score11-2 =–
| RD1-score12-2 =–
| RD1-score11-agg=3
| RD1-score12-agg=1
| RD1-team13 = '''[[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico-PE]]'''
| RD1-team14 = [[Atlético Roraima Clube|Atlético-RR]]
| RD1-score13-1 = 7
| RD1-score14-1 = 1
| RD1-score13-2 =–
| RD1-score14-2 =–
| RD1-score13-agg=7
| RD1-score14-agg=1
| RD1-team15 = '''[[Clube Atlético Juventus|Juventus-SP]]'''
| RD1-team16 = [[Associação Atlética Coruripe|Coruripe-AL]]
| RD1-score15-1 = 1
| RD1-score16-1 = 4
| RD1-score15-2 = 5
| RD1-score16-2 = 1
| RD1-score15-agg=6
| RD1-score16-agg=5
| RD2-team01 = '''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo-RJ]]'''
| RD2-team02 = [[River Atlético Clube|River-PI]]
| RD2-score01-1 = 1
| RD2-score02-1 = 2
| RD2-score01-2 = 2
| RD2-score02-2 = 0
| RD2-score01-agg=3
| RD2-score02-agg=2
| RD2-team03 = '''[[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa-SP]]'''
| RD2-team04 = [[Volta Redonda Futebol Clube|Volta Redonda-RJ]]
| RD2-score03-1 = 0
| RD2-score04-1 = 0
| RD2-score03-2 = 2
| RD2-score04-2 = 0
| RD2-score03-agg=2
| RD2-score04-agg=0
| RD2-team05 = '''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético-MG]]'''
| RD2-team06 = [[Nacional Futebol Clube|Nacional-AM]]
| RD2-score05-1 = 2
| RD2-score06-1 = 2
| RD2-score05-2 = 4
| RD2-score06-2 = 1
| RD2-score05-agg=6
| RD2-score06-agg=3

| RD2-team07 = '''[[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico-PE]]'''
| RD2-team08 = [[Clube Atlético Juventus|Juventus-SP]]
| RD2-score07-1 = 0
| RD2-score08-1 = 2
| RD2-score07-2 = 3
| RD2-score08-2 = 0
| RD2-score07-agg=3
| RD2-score08-agg=2
| RD3-team01 = '''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo-RJ]]'''
| RD3-team02 = [[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa-SP]]
| RD3-score01-1 = 1
| RD3-score02-1 = 1
| RD3-score01-2 = 2
| RD3-score02-2 = 1
| RD3-score01-agg=3
| RD3-score02-agg=2
| RD3-team03 = '''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético-MG]]'''&nbsp;([[away goals rule|a]])
| RD3-team04 = [[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico-PE]]
| RD3-score03-1 = 2
| RD3-score04-1 = 3
| RD3-score03-2 = 1
| RD3-score04-2 = 0
| RD3-score03-agg=3
| RD3-score04-agg=3
| RD4-team01 = '''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo-RJ]]'''
| RD4-team02 = [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético-MG]]
| RD4-score01-1 = 0
| RD4-score02-1 = 0
| RD4-score01-2 = 2
| RD4-score02-2 = 0
| RD4-score01-agg=2
| RD4-score02-agg=0
}}

===Bracket 3===
{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n
| RD1= First Round
| RD2= Second Round
| RD3= Round of 16
| RD4= Quarterfinals
| RD1-team01 = '''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras-SP]]'''
| RD1-team02 = [[Centro Esportivo Nova Esperança|CENE-MS]]
| RD1-score01-1=2
| RD1-score02-1=0
| RD1-score01-2=–
| RD1-score02-2=–
| RD1-score01-agg=2
| RD1-score02-agg=0
| RD1-team03 = [[Clube do Remo|Remo-PA]]
| RD1-team04 = '''[[Central Sport Club|Central-PE]]'''
| RD1-score03-1 = 0
| RD1-score04-1 = 0
| RD1-score03-2 = 0
| RD1-score04-2 = 2
| RD1-score03-agg=0
| RD1-score04-agg=2

| RD1-team05 = '''[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport-PE]]'''
| RD1-team06 = [[Sociedade Imperatriz de Desportos|Imperatriz-MA]]
| RD1-score05-1 = 2
| RD1-score06-1 = 2
| RD1-score05-2 = 4
| RD1-score06-2 = 1
| RD1-score05-agg=6
| RD1-score06-agg=3

| RD1-team07 = '''[[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense-DF]]'''
| RD1-team08 = [[Sport Club Ulbra|Ulbra-RS]]
| RD1-score07-1 = 1
| RD1-score08-1 = 1
| RD1-score07-2 = 1
| RD1-score08-2 = 0
| RD1-score07-agg=2
| RD1-score08-agg=1

| RD1-team09 = '''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional-RS]]'''
| RD1-team10 = [[Nacional Atlético Clube (Patos)|Nacional-PB]]
| RD1-score09-1 = 4
| RD1-score10-1 = 0
| RD1-score09-2 = –
| RD1-score10-2 = –
| RD1-score09-agg=4
| RD1-score10-agg=0

| RD1-team11 = [[Guarani Futebol Clube|Guarani-SP]]
| RD1-team12 = '''[[Associação Chapecoense de Futebol|Chapecoense-SC]]'''
| RD1-score11-1 = 1
| RD1-score12-1 = 3
| RD1-score11-2 = 0
| RD1-score12-2 = 0
| RD1-score11-agg=1
| RD1-score12-agg=3

| RD1-team13 = '''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória-BA]]'''
| RD1-team14 = [[Sousa Esporte Clube|Sousa-PB]]
| RD1-score13-1 = 4
| RD1-score14-1 = 1
| RD1-score13-2 = –
| RD1-score14-2 = –
| RD1-score13-agg=4
| RD1-score14-agg=1

| RD1-team15 = '''[[Paraná Clube|Paraná-PR]]'''
| RD1-team16 = [[Trem Desportivo Clube|Trem-AP]]
| RD1-score15-1 = 0
| RD1-score16-1 = 0
| RD1-score15-2 = 4
| RD1-score16-2 = 0
| RD1-score15-agg=4
| RD1-score16-agg=0

| RD2-team01 = '''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras-SP]]'''
| RD2-team02 = [[Central Sport Club|Central-PE]]
| RD2-score01-1 = 5
| RD2-score02-1 = 1
| RD2-score01-2 = –
| RD2-score02-2 = –
| RD2-score01-agg=5
| RD2-score02-agg=1

| RD2-team03 = '''[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport-PE]]'''
| RD2-team04 = [[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense-DF]]
| RD2-score03-1 = 2
| RD2-score04-1 = 1
| RD2-score03-2 = 4
| RD2-score04-2 = 1
| RD2-score03-agg=6
| RD2-score04-agg=2

| RD2-team05 = '''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional-RS]]'''
| RD2-team06 = [[Associação Chapecoense de Futebol|Chapecoense-SC]]
| RD2-score05-1 = 2
| RD2-score06-1 = 0
| RD2-score05-2 = –
| RD2-score06-2 = –
| RD2-score05-agg=2
| RD2-score06-agg=0

| RD2-team07 = [[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória-BA]]
| RD2-team08 = '''[[Paraná Clube|Paraná-PR]]'''&nbsp;([[away goals rule|a]])
| RD2-score07-1 = 0
| RD2-score08-1 = 1
| RD2-score07-2 = 2
| RD2-score08-2 = 1
| RD2-score07-agg=2
| RD2-score08-agg=2

| RD3-team01 = [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras-SP]]
| RD3-team02 = '''[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport-PE]]'''
| RD3-score01-1 = 0
| RD3-score02-1 = 0
| RD3-score01-2 = 1
| RD3-score02-2 = 4
| RD3-score01-agg=1
| RD3-score02-agg=4

| RD3-team03 = '''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional-RS]]'''
| RD3-team04 = [[Paraná Clube|Paraná-PR]]
| RD3-score03-1 = 0
| RD3-score04-1 = 2
| RD3-score03-2 = 5
| RD3-score04-2 = 1
| RD3-score03-agg=5
| RD3-score04-agg=3

| RD4-team01 = '''[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport-PE]]'''
| RD4-team02 = [[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional-RS]]
| RD4-score01-1 = 0
| RD4-score02-1 = 1
| RD4-score01-2 = 3
| RD4-score02-2 = 1
| RD4-score01-agg=3
| RD4-score02-agg=2
}}

===Bracket 4===
{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n

| RD1= First Round
| RD2= Second Round
| RD3= Round of 16
| RD4= Quarterfinals

| RD1-team01 = '''[[Clube de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama-RJ]]'''
| RD1-team02 = [[Associação Olímpica de Itabaiana|Itabaiana-SE]]
| RD1-score01-1 = 1
| RD1-score02-1 = 0
| RD1-score01-2 = 3
| RD1-score02-2 = 2
| RD1-score01-agg=4
| RD1-score02-agg=2

| RD1-team03 = '''[[Clube Atlético Bragantino|Bragantino-SP]]'''&nbsp;([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD1-team04 = [[Esporte Clube Democrata|Democrata (GV)-MG]]
| RD1-score03-1 = 2
| RD1-score04-1 = 3
| RD1-score03-2 = 2
| RD1-score04-2 = 1
| RD1-score03-agg=4
| RD1-score04-agg=4
| RD1-team05 = [[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia-BA]]
| RD1-team06 = '''[[Associação Desportiva Recreativa Cultural Icasa|Icasa-CE]]'''
| RD1-score05-1 = 2
| RD1-score06-1 = 3
| RD1-score05-2 = 2
| RD1-score06-2 = 2
| RD1-score05-agg=4
| RD1-score06-agg=5
| RD1-team07 = '''[[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma-SC]]'''
| RD1-team08 = [[Associação Cultural Esporte Clube Baraúnas|Baraúnas-RN]]
| RD1-score07-1 = 2
| RD1-score08-1 = 2
| RD1-score07-2 = 2
| RD1-score08-2 = 0
| RD1-score07-agg=4
| RD1-score08-agg=2
| RD1-team09 = [[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético-PR]]
| RD1-team10 = '''[[Sport Club Corinthians Alagoano|Corinthians-AL]]'''&nbsp;([[Penalty shootout (football)|p]])
| RD1-score09-1 = 1
| RD1-score10-1 = 1
| RD1-score09-2 = 1
| RD1-score10-2 = 1
| RD1-score09-agg=2 (3)
| RD1-score10-agg=2 (4)
| RD1-team11 = '''[[Atlético Clube Paranavaí|Paranavaí-PR]]'''
| RD1-team12 = [[Esporte Clube Águia Negra|Águia Negra-MS]]
| RD1-score11-1 = 4
| RD1-score12-1 = 3
| RD1-score11-2 = 3
| RD1-score12-2 = 3
| RD1-score11-agg=7
| RD1-score12-agg=6
| RD1-team13 = '''[[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude-RS]] ([[Penalty shootout (football)|p]])'''
| RD1-team14 = [[Linhares Futebol Clube|Linhares-ES]]
| RD1-score13-1 = 0
| RD1-score14-1 = 0
| RD1-score13-2 = 0
| RD1-score14-2 = 0
| RD1-score13-agg=0 (5)
| RD1-score14-agg=0 (4)
| RD1-team15 = [[ABC Futebol Clube|ABC-RN]]
| RD1-team16 = '''[[Madureira Esporte Clube|Madureira-RJ]]  ([[Penalty shootout (football)|p]])'''
| RD1-score15-1 = 1
| RD1-score16-1 = 1
| RD1-score15-2 = 1
| RD1-score16-2 = 1
| RD1-score15-agg=2 (3)
| RD1-score16-agg=2 (4)
| RD2-team01 =  '''[[Clube de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama-RJ]]'''
| RD2-team02 =  [[Clube Atlético Bragantino|Bragantino-SP]]
| RD2-score01-1 = 2
| RD2-score02-1 = 2
| RD2-score01-2 = 2
| RD2-score02-2 = 1
| RD2-score01-agg=4
| RD2-score02-agg=3
| RD2-team03 = [[Associação Desportiva Recreativa Cultural Icasa|Icasa-CE]]
| RD2-team04 = '''[[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma-SC]]'''
| RD2-score03-1 = 1
| RD2-score04-1 = 6
| RD2-score03-2 =–
| RD2-score04-2 =–
| RD2-score03-agg=1
| RD2-score04-agg=6

| RD2-team05 = '''[[Sport Club Corinthians Alagoano|Corinthians-AL]]'''
| RD2-team06 = [[Atlético Clube Paranavaí|Paranavaí-PR]]
| RD2-score05-1 = 1
| RD2-score06-1 = 0
| RD2-score05-2 = 4
| RD2-score06-2 = 1
| RD2-score05-agg=5
| RD2-score06-agg=1

| RD2-team07 = '''[[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude-RS]]'''
| RD2-team08 = [[Madureira Esporte Clube|Madureira-RJ]]
| RD2-score07-1 = 3
| RD2-score08-1 = 0
| RD2-score07-2 = –
| RD2-score08-2 = –
| RD2-score07-agg=3
| RD2-score08-agg=0

| RD3-team01 = '''[[Clube de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama-RJ]]'''
| RD3-team02 = [[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma-SC]]
| RD3-score01-1 = 1
| RD3-score02-1 = 0
| RD3-score01-2 = 2
| RD3-score02-2 = 2
| RD3-score01-agg=3
| RD3-score02-agg=2

| RD3-team03 = '''[[Sport Club Corinthians Alagoano|Corinthians-AL]]'''&nbsp;([[away goals rule|a]])
| RD3-team04 = [[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude-RS]]
| RD3-score03-1 = 2
| RD3-score04-1 = 0
| RD3-score03-2 = 1
| RD3-score04-2 = 3
| RD3-score03-agg=3
| RD3-score04-agg=3

| RD4-team01 = '''[[Clube de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama-RJ]]'''
| RD4-team02 = [[Sport Club Corinthians Alagoano|Corinthians-AL]]
| RD4-score01-1 = 5
| RD4-score02-1 = 1
| RD4-score01-2 = 3
| RD4-score02-2 = 1
| RD4-score01-agg=8
| RD4-score02-agg=2
}}

===Final phase===
{{4TeamBracket-2legs
| RD1=Semi-finals
| RD2=Finals

| RD1-team1='''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians-SP]]'''&nbsp;([[Penalty shootout (football)|p]])
| RD1-score1-1=1
| RD1-score1-2=2
| RD1-score1-A='''3 (5)'''
| RD1-team2=[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo-RJ]]
| RD1-score2-1=2
| RD1-score2-2=1
| RD1-score2-A='''3 (4)'''

| RD1-team3='''[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport-PE]]'''&nbsp;([[Penalty shootout (football)|p]])
| RD1-score3-1=2
| RD1-score3-2=0
| RD1-score3-A='''2 (5)'''
| RD1-team4=[[Clube de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama-RJ]]
| RD1-score4-1=0
| RD1-score4-2=2
| RD1-score4-A='''2 (4)'''

| RD2-team1=[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians-SP]]
| RD2-score1-1=3
| RD2-score1-2=0
| RD2-score1-A='''3'''
| RD2-team2='''[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport-PE]]'''&nbsp;([[away goals rule|a]])
| RD2-score2-1=1
| RD2-score2-2=2
| RD2-score2-A='''3'''
}}

==Top scorers==
''Updated to games played 2008-06-06''
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!#
!Scorer
!Team
!Goals
|-
|rowspan="3" align=center|'''1'''
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Edmundo Alves de Souza Neto|Edmundo]]
|[[Clube de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama-RJ]]
|rowspan="3" align=center|'''6'''
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Romero Mendonça Sobrinho|Romerito]]
|[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport-PE]]
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Wellington Pereira do Nascimento|Wellington Paulista]]
|[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo-RJ]]
|-
|rowspan="2" align=center|4
|{{flagicon|ARG}} [[Germán Gustavo Herrera|Germán Herrera]]
|[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians-SP]]
|rowspan="2" align=center|5
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Reinaldo Gonçalves Félix|Reinaldo]]
|[[Sport Club Corinthians Alagoano|Corinthians-AL]]
|-
|}

==Champion==

{| width=95%
|- align=center
|'''Copa do Brasil 2008''':<br><br>[[Image:Bandeira de Pernambuco.svg|border|120px|Sport]]<br>'''[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport-PE]]'''<br/>'''First Title'''
|}

==External links==
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20071211160204/http://paginas.terra.com.br/esporte/rsssfbrasil/tables/cbr2008.htm Copa do Brasil 2008 at RSSSF]
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20060512171602/http://cbfnews.uol.com.br/copadobrasil/ Copa do Brasil at CBF]

{{2008 in Brazilian football}}
{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}

[[Category:2008 in domestic association football cups|Copa Do Brasil, 2008]]
[[Category:2008 Brazilian football competitions|Copa Do Brasil, 2008]]
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|2008]]
